name: Engraven
short_description: Engraven is a single player sci-fi real time tactics game. Build and customize your regiment of soldiers and fight endless hordes of sorcerers and graven thralls.
detailed_description: Inspired by the games like the Total War series and XCOM, Engraven puts you in charge of a group of conscripted soldiers, fighting to earn your freedom in a post-apocalyptic world.  As the leader of a regiment, you will equip your soldiers, replace their wounded limbs with cybernetic augmentations, and order them in battle through a system of squad orders and actions.
about_the_game: Inspired by the games like the Total War series and XCOM, Engraven puts you in charge of a group of conscripted soldiers, fighting to earn your freedom in a post-apocalyptic world.  As the leader of a regiment, you will equip your soldiers, replace their wounded limbs with cybernetic augmentations, and order them in battle through a system of squad orders and actions.
